# AT+CCID responses — SIM ICCID (Integrated Circuit Card Identifier)
# Format: +ICCID: <iccid>  or  <iccid>  (vendor-dependent)

# Standard 20-digit ICCID
+ICCID: 89490200001234567890
OK

# 19-digit ICCID (trailing F padding stripped by some modems)
+ICCID: 8949020000123456789
OK

# Alternative response format (no +ICCID: prefix, some Quectel modules)
89490200009876543210
OK

# SIM not inserted
+CME ERROR: 10

# SIM initialising (not ready yet)
+CME ERROR: 14
